rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MIKE ANGEL LEON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver With Pos
rulings.Rulings: Appearance Required. Remote appearance is available consistent with San Francisco Superior Court Local Rules, rule 14.1(D). To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
